title: iochroma longipes
intro: Iochroma longipes, also known as the purple flower vine or purple flower tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and respiratory issues, with its leaves and stems containing compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Iochroma longipes include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in the treatment of infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, or as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
